title: polystichum imbricans
intro: Polystichum imbricans, also known as the western sword fern, is a species of fern native to the western United States and Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, as well as acting as a natural remedy for wounds and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the western sword fern can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
